name: budget_agent
description: an agent under a token/cost budget; actions call, cache, stop

card.description: an agent under a token/cost budget; actions call, cache, stop

rules: 'call' makes a fresh model call: it pays call_cost from the budget, produces a result, and warms the cache so that result can be reused.
'cache' reuses a cached result for the cheaper cache_cost; it is a no-op until at least one 'call' has warmed the cache.
Any action that cannot be paid for from the remaining budget is a no-op, so the budget never goes negative; budget + spent stays constant.
'stop' halts the agent; once stopped, every action (including stop) is a no-op. results always equals calls + cache_hits.

emit.report: budget {budget} (spent {spent}) | results {results} = {calls} calls + {cache_hits} cache hits | stopped {stopped}
